Created attachment 217008
trivial update of Makefile and distinfo

trivial update of Make and distinfo. Also adding a patch to "relax" pinned requirements and allow upgrade for example of py-cryptography as explained here [1]

Please let me know if there's anything else you need.

[1] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=245929#c9
